code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut state = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut count = 0
  while i < n
    let bo = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match bo
    when Some(c)
      let is_ws = c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if state == 0
        if is_ws
          i = i
        else if c == 45
          sign = -1
          state = 1
        else if c == 43
          sign = 1
          state = 1
        else if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          current = c - 48
          state = 1
        end
      else
        if is_ws
          let val = current * sign
          if count == 0
            a = val
          else
            b = val
          end
          count = count + 1
          current = 0
          sign = 1
          state = 0
        else if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          current = current * 10 + (c - 48)
        end
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if state == 1
    let val = current * sign
    if count == 0
      a = val
    else
      b = val
    end
  end
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
